Yuwei Liu
Fragments Works About

Fish (2025)

A 16mm film study of a small fish shop with Diwen Xu , observing its textures, rhythms, and quiet intensity. Shot in grainy black and white, the footage lingers on fish laid out on ice, reflective surfaces, and the presence of the shopkeeper. The images feel both documentary and slightly uncanny—caught between stillness and decay. Rather than telling a narrative, the work focuses on atmosphere, where material, light, and time shape a subtle, almost tactile experience of the space.

Director's Cut
